snippets.D0001:
<!--- D0001 · Crear base de datos (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
CREATE DATABASE demo_db;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0002:
<!--- D0002 · Crear tabla (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
USE demo_db;
CREATE TABLE users (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_users_email(email)
);
</cfquery>
snippets.D0003:
<!--- D0003 · Insertar registro (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
INSERT INTO users(name, email) VALUES ('Ana', 'ana@demo.cl');
</cfquery>
snippets.D0004:
<!--- D0004 · Actualizar registro (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
UPDATE users SET email = 'ana2@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0005:
<!--- D0005 · Eliminar registro (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
DELETE FROM users WHERE id = 1;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0006:
<!--- D0006 · Seleccionar con filtro (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
SELECT id, name, email, created_at
FROM users
WHERE email LIKE '%@demo.cl'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0007:
<!--- D0007 · Join básico (Intermedio, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id AS order_id, o.total
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0008:
<!--- D0008 · Crear índice (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ix_users_email ON users(email);
</cfquery>
snippets.D0009:
<!--- D0009 · Transacción (Intermedio, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
START TRANSACTION;
  UPDATE users SET email = 'x@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;
  -- Si algo falla: ROLLBACK;
COMMIT;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0010:
<!--- D0010 · Upsert (Intermedio, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
INSERT INTO users(name, email)
VALUES ('Ana', 'ana@demo.cl')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
</cfquery>
snippets.D0011:
<!--- D0011 · Paginación (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
SELECT id, name, email
FROM users
ORDER BY id
LIMIT 10 OFFSET 20;
</cfquery>
snippets.D0012:
<!--- D0012 · Crear vista (Básico, Base de datos) --->
<cfquery datasource="demo_dsn">
CREATE VIEW v_users AS
SELECT id, name, email FROM users;
</cfquery>
